mapper.sql: FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN deal d ON d.id = o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id = o.shop_id JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = o.user_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.order_id = o.id AND p.id = (SELECT MAX(px.id) FROM payment px WHERE px.order_id = o.id) LEFT JOIN refund r ON r.order_id = o.id

o.id, o.order_no, s.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, o.shop_id, s.name AS shop_name, o.user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS user_nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.email, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '') AS account, o.deal_id, COALESCE(d.title, '') AS deal_title, o.quantity, o.unit_price, o.amount, o.currency, o.pay_method, o.pay_status, o.status, p.channel AS payment_channel, p.channel_txn AS payment_channel_txn, p.status AS payment_status, o.paid_at, o.created_at, p.created_at AS payment_created_at, r.id AS refund_id, r.amount AS refund_amount, r.reason AS refund_reason, r.status AS refund_status, r.audit_reason AS refund_audit_reason, r.audited_at AS refund_audited_at, r.created_at AS refund_created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE refund SET status = 1, audit_by = #{adminId}, audit_reason = #{reason}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 0
UPDATE refund SET status = 2, audit_by = #{adminId}, audit_reason = #{reason}, audited_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 0
UPDATE `order` SET pay_status = 2, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{orderId} AND pay_status = 1 AND status = 1
UPDATE coupon SET status = 4 WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 1

UPDATE deal SET stock = CASE WHEN stock = -1 THEN -1 ELSE stock + #{quantity} END, sold_count = CASE WHEN sold_count >= #{quantity} THEN sold_count - #{quantity} ELSE 0 END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{dealId}
